name: PR-SOURCES.yaml registry validates against the cross-cutting source contract for the L phase
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:
  - {id: cfpb-consumerfinance, source_class: federal-financial-regulator, tier: 1, applies_to: [react, node]}
operator_namespace: []
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-registry.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && grep -q 'sources_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
